content.en:
Three days passed.

The Lord of the Yuan Gu appeared in front of Ye Tian again, and at this moment, the Lord of the Yuan Gu was already holding a light cluster in his hand, and this light group was the innate origin of the thing, the innate light source.

Although this is only a relatively low-level innate origin thing, it still has a majestic origin energy.

"The Innate Origin Thing is in hand, what about those things yours?"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu asked.

"We need to sign a contract so that both parties don't go back on it!"

Ye Tian said.

"Yes!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu nodded.

If it was something extremely precious and innately originate, he might regret it, but if it was just an innate light source, he wouldn't regret it.

Besides, Ye Tian's identity is not ordinary, and he doesn't want to offend Ye Tian.

In addition, Ye Tian is only a clone now, it is useless to kill a clone, if the body is here, he can completely capture Ye Tian and search for souls to obtain information and secrets.

But the doppelganger can't!

The clone can be annihilated in an instant, and there is no way to obtain soul memories at all.

The two parties quickly completed the contract and began the transaction.

Ye Tian gave all the treasures and resources needed for the transaction to the Lord of the Yuan Gu, and the Lord of the Yuan Gu also handed over the innate light source to Ye Tian.

"The Lord of the Yuan Gu is happy to cooperate, next time I will bring more precious treasures and more precious information to trade with you!"

With that, Ye Tian left.

......

Whew!!

Ye Tian's fourth deity kept shuttling, and then took out two spells, cutting off time and space and cause and effect, so that even if the Lord of the Yuan Gu and others wanted to track him, there was absolutely no way to track him.

When Ye Tianyuan walked away, several figures appeared here, one of which was the Lord of the Yuan Gu, as well as the Cause and Effect Supreme, the Stone Dragon Supreme, the Golden Light Supreme and others.

"Lord of the Yuan Gu, I can't find the other party, I can't track it!"

Cause and Effect Supreme Path.

"I expected that this man would not let us find his lair!" said the Lord of the Yuan Gu.

"Lord of the Yuan Gu, you just traded the Innate Light Source to that person so easily?" said the Golden Light Supreme with a frown.

"It's just an innate light source, it's not worth much, it's not of much use to us, and there are a lot of things to trade this time, especially those cultivation secret techniques and inheritances, which are all relatively good, in terms of value, it's definitely more than an innate light source, and I'm not without losses." Moreover, the information given to us by this person in the ancient temple is also very valuable, and then we will focus on searching for the reincarnated, and we will also look for the mysterious organization where the ancient temple is located, if we find it, I don't mind destroying them!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu said coldly.

......

Wasteland.

Ye Tian's fourth deity is back.

Deserted Tower.

Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief at this moment, this time it was indeed very dangerous to trade with the Lord of the Yuan Gu, if he couldn't fool the Lord of the Yuan Gu, this clone would be dead.

It is not easy to cultivate a clone with supreme combat power, and Ye Tian naturally doesn't want this clone to be lost.

What's more, if this transaction fails, it will be difficult for him to get the innate light source.

"The Lord of the Yuan Gu still wants to make the next transaction, hehe, I don't have much information in my hands, and most of the resources on my body are useless to the Lord of the Yuan Gu, what is really useful, where am I willing to trade. This transaction is the last one, and when I practice the Constant Light Divine Power, the Lord of the Yuan Gu will not want to kill me!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He didn't return to the Terrans in the first place, he needed to wait, what if the Lord of the Primordial could find him?

Therefore, he waited in the wasteland for some time, and then secretly returned to the human race and handed over the innate light source to the main body.

That's a hundred years.

A hundred years is just a snap of a finger for a strong man like Ye Tian, not a long time, he can afford to wait.

this day.

Ye Tian's fourth deity left the wasteland and secretly came to the edge of the human race, and Ye Tian's body also came here in person and obtained the innate light source from the fourth deity.

Subsequently, the fourth deity returned to the Wasteland.

Holy City, in the Heavenly Pavilion.

Ye Tian held the innate light source in his hand, and his heart was very excited.

"The speed talent and the aurora talent haven't been fully fused yet, but I can't wait, turn on time acceleration!"

Ye Tian muttered.

As long as it does not involve the fusion of time talents, in fact, time acceleration can be carried out, so after turning on time acceleration, in less than a year in the outside world, Ye Tian has successfully fused the speed talent and the aurora talent.

The talent after the fusion of these two god-level talents, Ye Tian named it Hengguang Talent, which corresponds to the Constant Light Divine Power.

The Hengguang talent is cultivated, the Hengguang Divine Power is in hand, and the innate light source is also available, Ye Tian meets all the requirements for cultivating the Constant Light Divine Power, and he can start cultivating the Constant Light Divine Power.

"I'm finally able to cultivate, I can't cultivate the prototype of the Chaos Divine Power at the moment, but it is not bad to be able to cultivate the Constant Light Divine Power, one of the three thousand great divine powers. According to the inheritance of the Constant Light Divine Power, the Constant Light Divine Power is also deduced from a Chaos Divine Power, and if I can raise the Constant Light Talent to the super god level in the future, I can directly cultivate that Chaos Divine Power. Therefore, the value of the constant light supernatural power is very great, and it must be practiced. Ye Tian said excitedly.

But he also knew very well that the Constant Light Divine Power was far more difficult to practice than the ordinary Great Divine Power, and he could easily practice a Great Divine Power now, but it was very difficult to cultivate the Constant Light Divine Power to the beginning, and it would take a long time.

"10,000 years, if it is accelerated by 2,000 times the time, it will be 20 million years! I spend 20 million years to comprehend the Hengguang supernatural power, I don't believe that I can't enter the door!"

Ye Tiandao.

2000 times time acceleration is also the maximum limit of super god-level time talent acceleration, this is also the limit that the universe can allow, even if Ye Tian's time talent can transform again in the future, 2000 times time acceleration is also the limit.

Next, Ye Tian began to retreat, fully comprehending the Hengguang Divine Power, and even gave up other aspects of cultivation, and also forbade others to disturb, unless Xiao Yue, Ye Yu and others had an accident or Tiange and the human race were facing life and death, they could not come to disturb him.

In this way, Ye Tian began a 10,000-year retreat.

In the blink of an eye.

Ten thousand years have passed.

In the past 10,000 years, Ye Tian has been in retreat, and the third and fourth deities have also been improving their strength, completely ignoring everything that happens in the outside world.

And in the past 10,000 years, a lot of big things have indeed happened in the outside world!
